proposal.expected_effect: Convert SVG-root clicks into precise mouse clicks on the requested grid point without changing the prompt.

intervention.expected_effect: Convert SVG-root clicks into precise mouse clicks on the requested grid point without changing the prompt.
intervention.rationale: Candidate failure evidence shows the agent identified the target coordinate but clicked the SVG root because the target circle had no bid-addressable action.
intervention.risk: Only applies when the grid target can be parsed from goal/html/bbox evidence; otherwise it should no-op rather than guess.
intervention.summary: Enable a coordinate-aware click policy for SVG grid-coordinate targets.

proposal.rationale: Candidate failure evidence shows the agent identified the target coordinate but clicked the SVG root because the target circle had no bid-addressable action.
proposal.risk: Only applies when the grid target can be parsed from goal/html/bbox evidence; otherwise it should no-op rather than guess.
proposal.summary: Enable a coordinate-aware click policy for SVG grid-coordinate targets.

proposal.expected_effect: Improve completion rate on longer tasks.

intervention.expected_effect: Improve completion rate on longer tasks.
intervention.rationale: Candidate failures are dominated by `timeout`, suggesting the agent may need more interaction budget.
intervention.risk: May increase latency and can worsen looping behavior if failures are not actually budget-limited.
intervention.summary: Increase the step budget for tasks that appear budget-limited.

proposal.rationale: Candidate failures are dominated by `timeout`, suggesting the agent may need more interaction budget.
proposal.risk: May increase latency and can worsen looping behavior if failures are not actually budget-limited.

proposal.expected_effect: Improve success rate on recoverable interaction failures with a small latency increase.

intervention.summary: Enable a conservative retry policy for invalid-action or no-progress failures.
